name: Missing user profile should not crash
issue: Profile page crashes when user id does not exist.
expected_outcome: Patch app/user_service.py so missing users return a safe fallback profile and tests pass.

name: Limit default and boundary handling
issue: top_items returns an empty list when limit is omitted; it should return all items by default and reject negative limits.
expected_outcome: Patch app/pagination.py so None means all items and negative limits raise ValueError.

name: Wrong test assertion should be corrected
issue: The discount implementation is correct, but one pytest assertion uses the wrong expected value for a 10 percent discount.
expected_outcome: Patch tests/test_discounts.py to assert the mathematically correct discounted price.

name: README usage documentation
issue: Update README with setup instructions and a short usage example.
expected_outcome: Patch README.md only; existing smoke tests still pass.

name: Multi-file call chain missing record
issue: API get item display name crashes for a missing item id because the service does not handle the repository returning None.
expected_outcome: Patch app/service.py so missing repository records return Unknown item while preserving the call chain.
